lessons.title: First Steps with Python
lessons.description: Learn how to display text on screen using the print() function.

lessons.title: Variables and Calculations
lessons.description: Learn how to assign values to variables and perform basic arithmetic.

lessons.title: Data Types and Conversion
lessons.description: Learn the difference between string and number types and how to convert between them.

lessons.title: User Input
lessons.description: Learn how to receive input from the user using the input() function.

lessons.title: Debugging Basics
lessons.description: Learn how to read error messages and fix bugs using basic debugging techniques.

chapters.title: Conditional Statements
chapters.description: Learn to control program flow with conditions

lessons.title: Basics of Conditional Statements
lessons.description: Learn how to use if statements to branch program flow based on conditions.

lessons.title: else and elif
lessons.description: Learn how to handle multiple conditions using else and elif.

lessons.title: Logical Operators
lessons.description: Learn how to build compound conditions using and, or, and not operators.

lessons.title: for Loop Basics
lessons.description: Learn how to repeat operations a fixed number of times using for loops and range().

lessons.title: Advanced for Loops
lessons.description: Learn how to use for loops to calculate sums and averages.

lessons.title: while Loops
lessons.description: Learn how to use while loops to repeat operations until a condition is met.

chapters.title: Data Structures
chapters.description: Learn to work with collections of data

lessons.title: List Basics
lessons.description: Learn the basics of lists: creating them, accessing elements, and checking length.

lessons.title: List Operations
lessons.description: Learn how to add, remove, sort, and search elements in a list.

lessons.title: for Loops and Lists
lessons.description: Learn how to combine for loops with lists to process and filter elements.

lessons.title: Dictionary Basics
lessons.description: Learn how to use dictionaries to store and retrieve data as key-value pairs.

lessons.title: Function Basics
lessons.description: Learn how to define reusable functions with parameters and return values.

lessons.title: Advanced Functions
lessons.description: Learn advanced function features: default arguments, keyword arguments, and multiple return values.

chapters.title: Practical Projects
chapters.description: Apply your knowledge to build real programs

lessons.title: Text-Based Game
lessons.description: Apply your knowledge to build the core logic of a number guessing game.

lessons.title: Data Analysis Program
lessons.description: Use lists and dictionaries to build a student grade analysis program.

lessons.title: File Operations Basics
lessons.description: Learn how to read and write text files using open() and the with statement.

lessons.title: Final Project: Task Manager App
lessons.description: Combine everything you've learned to build a complete task management app.

chapters.title: Error Handling
chapters.description: Learn to handle errors safely with exceptions

lessons.title: try/except Basics
lessons.description: Use try/except to implement a function that works safely even when an error occurs.

lessons.title: Types of Exceptions
lessons.description: Implement a safe division function that handles multiple exception types.

lessons.title: finally and raise
lessons.description: Use raise to implement a function that validates input values.

chapters.title: Classes and OOP
chapters.description: Learn to design programs using classes and objects

lessons.title: Class Basics
lessons.description: Define a class with attributes and methods to create objects.

lessons.title: Methods and Instances
lessons.description: Implement a class with state and practice updating attributes with methods.

lessons.title: Inheritance
lessons.description: Use inheritance to implement a base class and a derived class.

chapters.title: Recursion
chapters.description: Learn the concept of functions that call themselves

lessons.title: Recursion Basics
lessons.description: Implement a factorial function using recursion.

lessons.title: Recursion in Practice
lessons.description: Implement a function that returns the nth Fibonacci number using recursion.

chapters.title: Introduction to Algorithms
chapters.description: Learn fundamental search and sort algorithms

lessons.title: Search Algorithms
lessons.description: Implement linear search to find the index of a target value in a list.

lessons.title: Sort Algorithms
lessons.description: Implement bubble sort to sort a list of numbers in ascending order.

chapters.title: NumPy Basics
chapters.description: Learn the NumPy library for numerical computation

lessons.title: Creating and Manipulating Arrays
lessons.description: Create a NumPy array and implement a function that computes the sum and mean.

lessons.title: Numerical Computation and Statistics
lessons.description: Implement min-max normalization using NumPy to scale data into the 0–1 range.

chapters.title: Pandas Data Analysis
chapters.description: Learn the Pandas library for data analysis

lessons.title: DataFrame Basics
lessons.description: Learn basic DataFrame operations and implement a function that calculates the mean of a column.

lessons.title: Data Aggregation and Filtering
lessons.description: Use conditional filtering to implement a function that calculates the average of scores above a passing threshold.

chapters.title: Graph Drawing (Matplotlib)
chapters.description: Learn to visualize data by drawing charts and graphs

lessons.title: Basic Charts
lessons.description: Learn to visualize data by drawing a bar chart with Matplotlib.

lessons.title: Customizing Charts
lessons.description: Learn to plot multiple data series on one chart and customize it with legends, gridlines, scatter plots, and more.

lessons.title: SQL Basics
lessons.description: Understand the basic concepts of databases and tables, and learn to use SELECT, INSERT, and CREATE TABLE with Python's sqlite3 module.

lessons.title: WHERE, Aggregation, ORDER BY
lessons.description: Learn to filter rows with WHERE, use aggregate functions like COUNT, AVG, MAX, and MIN, and sort results with ORDER BY.

chapters.title: Advanced Projects
chapters.description: Take on practical projects combining all your knowledge

lessons.title: Comprehensive Project: Grade Management System
lessons.description: Implement a grade management system by combining classes, sqlite3, and exception handling.
